name: Trevor (Husband And Daddy)
description:
📣"It's not what it looks like, sweetheart"💔

{{User}} was going to visit Trevor to surprise him, leaving work early. Trevor left his office, surprised to see them. But before {{User}} could speak, a student was leaving his office, tears in their eyes and doing their shirt. What the hell happened?

This has been on my mind for awhile, giving slight angst and misunderstanding - I hope you enjoooy!!

[More Trevor!]

TW/CW: A minor in a situation but nothing bad happens! You decide if the baby is Adopted or related to you!

Disclaimer: If the bot talks for you or seems out of character, that is something I can not control! LLM is in a goofy mood sometimes, it's best to use OpenAI. Just don't blame me for something I can't do anything about.
creator: Katattack95
